title: BANDIT-056 Landing Verdict
landing_agent_replacement_evidence: Codex PM local-record Stage 5 landing verdict replaces unavailable standalone Landing Agent for this bootstrap-gap chore; local-record landing action remains the next required step after land-check passes.
rationale: BANDIT-056 is safe to land as the bounded bootstrap-gap chore resolving BANDIT-GAP-EVIDENCE-FRESHNESS-SLOS. Aggregate Stage 4 review evidence records current review_subject_hash 23d6bdc2a4f2d3a62464c8eac2b2d45393fb2d42bf0e4d6da6fc1eb78cde1184, CodeRabbit pass evidence with final trivial findings dispositioned as no-action or opportunistic, Local Qwen bootstrap_gap timeout evidence after two fail-closed attempts, escalated review not_applicable, clean-code pass, source-drift current, no required operator input, and UAT not_applicable because this non-product chore changes repo-native Evidence Freshness SLO validation and derived CLI projection trust signals without shipping an operator-clickable product surface. Current Stage 5 verification includes pre-verdict npm run bandit -- land-check BANDIT-056 correctly failing closed on the missing landing verdict artifact, node --test test/evidence-freshness-slos.test.mjs test/cockpit-status.test.mjs test/writer-stream-sanitizer.test.mjs with 31 passing tests, npm run typecheck, npm run bandit -- evidence-freshness-slos validate --json, npm run bandit -- validate, node ./bin/bandit.mjs review-subject-hash BANDIT-056 reporting the current review subject hash, and clean-code review against CLEAN_CODE.md. Clean-code status is pass because the final source changes remain scoped to Evidence Freshness SLO policy validation, trust-signal projection metadata, sanitizer hardening, focused test coverage, and evidence/routing artifacts; state authority remains repo-native and CLI-owned; derived cockpit and session-context outputs remain non-canonical; missing or stale evidence fails closed with explicit freshness states and staleness reasons; and accepted non-blocking review suggestions are routed as follow-up candidates or explicit no-action decisions. The Stage 4 repair ownership violation is not ignored: BANDIT-GAP-STAGE4-REPAIR-OWNERSHIP-ENFORCEMENT is queued and must be addressed after this slice lands and closes out. The work introduces no local server/API mode, state-index persistence, scheduler execution, worktree lifecycle execution, claim lease creation or release, work-surface reservation implementation, automatic merge/push/deploy behavior, product UAT approval, cockpit UI feature work, PR/CI workflow, dependency or lockfile change, paid reviewer routing, recurring paid routing policy, external service integration, installed global skill edit, or unrelated Phase 8 work.
